_meta.purpose: Deterministic rules for selecting the valuation model, VTS theory, and growth stage given a company's characteristics

model_selection.primary_model: FCFE (D6_ECF_Ke equivalent using net income as equity CF proxy)
model_selection.reason: FCFF/WACC is distorted for banks because operating CF includes loan originations. Source: ssrn-743229 §3.4; detectCompanyType.ts.
model_selection.fallback: If FCFE inputs unavailable → 'Valuation not available for financial companies' structured error

model_selection.primary_model: Revenue multiples (EV/Revenue) with DCF as secondary
forbidden: Residual value dominated DCF (>85% residual = unreliable)
model_selection.reason: Negative FCF makes terminal value the entire valuation — too speculative. Source: ssrn-1025424 Error I.7.
model_selection.dcf_use: Apply DCF with seeded FCF from revenue × avg sector FCF margin, flag as speculative

model_selection.primary_model: D2_FCF_WACC with negative FCF in early years (three-stage model)
model_selection.note: Do not force FCF to zero — allow negative FCF in growth phase. Terminal value uses normalized positive FCF.
model_selection.warning_threshold: If all 10 projected years have negative FCF → mark as 'speculative, high uncertainty'

model_selection.condition: g >= WACC in terminal value computation
model_selection.action: REJECT — return structured error. Do not compute. Source: ssrn-1025424 Error I.6.1.
model_selection.error_message: Terminal growth rate ({g}) >= WACC ({wacc}). Value would be infinite. Reduce g or increase WACC.

model_selection.condition: Debt schedule is fixed and known in advance (e.g., project finance, LBO)
model_selection.reason: Pre-set debt → VTS risk = Kd (Myers) or RF (MM). Source: ssrn-256987 §4.

model_selection.condition: Default case (debt rebalanced to target D/E ratio)
model_selection.reason: When leverage is rebalanced, VTS risk = Ku. Source: ssrn-274973 Proposition 1.
High growth must converge to stable growth. Immediate terminal value understates value loss during deceleration. Source: ssrn-1025424 Error I.3.
Stable/mature companies: explicit forecast period + terminal value sufficient.

model_selection.condition: After computing all applicable DCF methods
model_selection.action: VERIFY consistency: all methods must produce same equity value (within rounding tolerance ±0.1%). Divergence > 0.5% = input inconsistency flag.

model_selection.condition: Using Damodaran or Harris-Pringle beta formula with Fernandez VTS
model_selection.action: FLAG incompatibility. Compute leverage cost explicitly: CL = VTS_fernandez - VTS_damodaran.

high_growth_company.reason: Emerging/global nominal GDP. Source: Damodaran lifecycle framework.

terminal_growth_selection.hard_ceiling: terminal_g <= WACC - 0.005 (enforced as guard rail, not academic)

multi_model_weights._comment: Weights applied in triangulation. Source: detectCompanyType.ts getModelWeights()
